steps.title: Convert percent increase to a multiplier
steps.content:
A 676% increase means multiply the original by $(1 + 676/100)$. Calculate this multiplier:
$$1 + \frac{676}{100} = 1 + 6.76 = 7.76$$

steps.title: Calculate the final mass
steps.content:
The kangaroo's mass at 160 days old is:
$$7.76k$$
This matches choice A — A is correct.
